# Let's open the provided file path and inspect content and indices.
path = "/mnt/data/file-WiPzRdj7hyTn7WRdCD8mD2-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data_bytes = f.read()
try:
    text = data_bytes.decode("utf-8")
except UnicodeDecodeError as e:
    # Try decoding with common encodings
    text = data_bytes.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
len(text), text[:5000]

text = text  # already loaded
# Find all segments between angle quotes
segments = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('«', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('»', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    seg = text[i+1:j]
    segments.append((i, j, seg))
    start = j + 1
segments, len(segments)

# find all double-quoted segments
dq_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
dq_positions[:10], len(dq_positions)

# compute citations with start/end and verify equality
citations = []

# 1st hadith segments
for i, j, seg in segments:
    start = i+1
    end = j
    assert text[start:end] == seg
    citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": seg, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})

# ayah
ayah_start = 166+1
ayah_end = 195
assert text[ayah_start:ayah_end] == "وَإِنْ تُطِيعُوهُ تَهْتَدُوا"
# Insert into citations list appropriate in order by start
citations.append({"span_start": ayah_start, "span_end": ayah_end, "span_text": text[ayah_start:ayah_end], "citation_type": "Aya"})

# Sort by span_start
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
citations_sorted

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":37,"span_end":131,"span_text":"المؤمن الذي يخالط الناس ويصبر على أذاهم، أفضل من المؤمن الذي لا يخالط الناس ولا يصبر على أذاهم","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":167,"span_end":195,"span_text":"وَإِنْ تُطِيعُوهُ تَهْتَدُوا","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":265,"span_end":326,"span_text":"المؤمن القوي خير وأحب إلى الله من المؤمن الضعيف، وفي كلٍّ خير","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":666,"span_end":751,"span_text":"إن الله رفيق يحب الرفق، ويعطي على الرفق ما لا يعطي على العنف، وما لا يعطي على ما سواه","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":815,"span_end":873,"span_text":"إن الرفق لا يكون في شيء إلا زانه، ولا ينزع من شيء إلا شانه","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
